questionHtml: Determine whether each point is located above or below the x-axis.
markschemeHtml:
(P and Q are) both above (the x-axis)                    A1

Note: Award A1 if it is made clear that both points are above (the x-axis). Accept a labelled sketch that clearly shows this information.

[1 mark]

meta.title: Determine whether each point is located above or below the x-axis.
